description: Smart contracts powering the ThinkMesh protocol — on-chain reputation, rewards, and governance for collaborative problem solving.

wave.name: Wave 1 — Foundation
wave.goal: Fund the deployment and auditing of core smart contracts: THINK token, Reputation Registry, Impact NFTs, and DAO governance.

setupNote: Add your team wallet address as a split recipient before activating on Drips. See: https://docs.drips.network/drips-json
